CreateASharedTrafficPackage.reservationLength: Validity period of the shared traffic package (unit: month), options: 1/6/12
CreateASharedTrafficPackage.capacity: Capacity of the shared traffic package. When validity is 1 month, available options: "10G"/"50G"/"100G"/"500G"/"1T"/"5T"/"10T"/"50T"; when validity is 6 months, available options: "60G"/"300G"/"600G"/"3T"/"6T"/"30T"/"60T"/"300T"; when validity is 12 months, available options: "1T"/"10T"/"50T"/"100T"/"500T"/"1P". Capacity must be selected from the corresponding available specifications.
CreateASharedTrafficPackage.deductPolicy: Deduction policy of the shared traffic package. Options: "FullTimeDurationPackage" (full-time) or "TimeDurationPackage" (off-peak). Default is "FullTimeDurationPackage".
CreateASharedTrafficPackage.packageType: Line type of the shared traffic package. Currently supports "WebOutBytes" (dynamic). Default is "WebOutBytes".
